206011106.name: Brunswick East
206011106.explanation_live: Mid-range personal-crime rates, with a high socio-economic profile (SEIFA decile 10). Property crime runs higher here, typically retail/transport precincts rather than homes.
206011106.explanation_dev: Preliminary: only ~24% detached houses, so it's already fairly built-up, with high renter turnover signalling investor activity. Still missing: planning zoning/overlays, land values and electricity capacity (Phase 2).
206011106.explanation_invest: Median house $1.35M (2024): -3.6% over 12 months, -2.1% p.a. over 3 years — soft/flat recent growth. Mid-market pricing.
206011106.explanation_infra: Strong grid support: ~0.35 km from a transmission line (66 kV); 36 substations within 10 km, nearest ~0.72 km. Well placed for larger-scale development, subdivision or future EV/charging clusters.
